entries.content: Applied three-reviewer feedback to smart-compact skill. Key security fixes: secret scrubbing, defensive mkdir, vector memory failure warnings, project-scoped filenames.
Multi-agent CVE response workflow: Security agent threat hunt, builder agent designs, Claude Code implements with tests. Security panel on Mission Control: 7 files, 26 tests, 81%+ coverage.
Project structure pattern for greenfield projects: CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules/ + .claude/agents/ + .claude/commands/. Scales from startup to mature project.
Mission Control AGENT_ROSTER drifted from live OpenClaw config. Four emoji mappings wrong, all model versions stale. Recommendation: hydration step on startup.
Validated deep-research skill (Exa + Firecrawl). First deep research on AI memory architectures (22 sources). Implemented fact versioning + memory-audit. Published 2 blog posts.
GOAP (Goal-Oriented Action Planning) replaces fixed FSM rules for emergent multi-goal AI. Agents plan backwards from goals, selecting actions based on preconditions and effects.
NotebookLM DLP pattern: three-layer control (prevention, detection, remediation). Truncated word detection for ML-generated typos. Per-post asset directories with 300 DPI slide exports.
Removed 13 duplicate project-level rules (450 lines savings). Fixed Co-Authored-By contradiction. Removed redundant blog-post skill. Slimmed agents.md from 47 to 24 lines.
OMC feature gap analysis: keyword-detector is foundational, should be first. Other features (routing, filtering, alerting) depend on it.
OpenClaw 2026.4.2 changed cron JSON format from {cron, timezone} to {kind, expr, tz}. Broke Mission Control parser. Fixed with version detection in cron-utils.ts.
Wrap-up automation doesn't update KG for new components. KG Update Detect Hook doesn't fire in wrap-up context. Recommend adding KG sync to wrap-up workflow.
Built KG maintenance system: kg-update-detect.sh PostToolUse hook + /Knowledge-Graph-Sync 5-phase reconciliation command. Both registered in settings.json.
Claude Code project-level settings.json completely OVERRIDES (not merges) global settings. A partial project config shadows the entire global config section.
Power loss recovery: parallel integrity checks across 96 files (agents, workspaces, backups). Verify JSON parse, markdown fences, file termination, timestamps.
Mission Control 4-agent team review: 22 critical issues. Disk metric 12x off, global circuit breaker staling dashboard, ephemeral alert acks, font legibility at 7-8px.
OpenClaw schema uses 'channel': 'telegram' not 'provider': 'telegram' in bindings configuration.
Fixed Gmail scheduled trigger stale environment ID. Created bridge-launcher.sh auto-sync wrapper. Redesigned /wrap-up with vector memory, KG updates, component change detection.
Built /ui-ux skill: 5-agent tree (director + 4 specialists). 307 units of work. Knowledge base: 35 design rules, perceptual defaults, scaffold templates, React performance rules.
Syncthing SKILL.md vs skill.md conflict on APFS. Fix: two-step rename (SKILL.md -> _temp.md -> skill.md). Clean .syncthing.*.tmp files and manual rescan via REST API.
Alert API used wrong field names (message vs title/detail). Always verify actual field names in data, match to API contract.
Never put markdown content (tables, headers) inside code fences. Code fences exclusively for actual code. Fixed instances in GWS CLI and Gmail agent posts.
Multi-agent team with 6-7 specialists and phase gating catches critical issues early. Caught 2 critical + 4 high issues in Terry's vacation rental build.
UI/UX Design System deployed. 5 modes: Design, Build, Review, Fix, Audit. Cherry-picked from 6 frameworks. game-ux and blog-ux augmented with shared design rules.
NotebookLM MCP integration complete. Blog captain produces good drafts when given detailed session context. Superpowers brainstorm -> plan -> subagent pipeline validated.
Removed Co-Authored-By trailer from git-workflow.md. Vercel Hobby plan blocks deploys when GitHub can't resolve noreply@anthropic.com email.
iMessage storage: set Mac 'Keep Messages: 30 days' to auto-purge, keep iPhone 'Forever' for full iCloud history. macOS lacks granular local-only attachment purging.
Tier 1 cleanup: delete .next, DerivedData, Homebrew, Playwright, pip, pnpm caches. ~7GB recovery, zero operational impact.
MDX imports crash at runtime with next-mdx-remote (no module resolution context). Remove imports, register via MDXRemote components prop in page.tsx.
MDX does not support HTML comments (<!-- -->). Must use JSX comments ({/* */}). MDX compiles to JSX, HTML comments are invalid.
Vercel dashboard truncates error messages. Get full logs via vercel CLI, MCP build logs tool, or local reproduction.
SNES Environment Dashboard: static JSON export from Mac Mini, React Flow for KG graph, 7 pages, 16 custom SNES components. Auto-deploy via /dashboard-export.
